case_title: LYDON JOHN PO VS KLAUDER KARL Z.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KLAUDER KARL Z.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY LYDON JOHN PO AS TO DEFENDANT KLAUDER KARL Z. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LYDON JOHN PO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KLAUDER KARL Z. DEFENDANT TO RETURN TOOLS AND TOOL BOX TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO KARL Z KAULDER RETURNED MOVED LEFT N ADDRESS.
